No no not like that
The idea from the retired leaders are very important
Not really like shadow government. After all, leaders retired.
But because of Chinese tradition (Vietnam too) elderly with power in the past get huge respect.
Sometime it can make or break a problem, an issue
But they are not like a guy behind a curtain and control everything like you might imagine

comment.body:
Hi Alma, can you give a macro update on US vs. China given the escalation in the trade war with China restricting exports and the 100% Tariff on China announced by Trump Friday. 
Is this in your view the event that trigger the pullback now to let Israeli and middle eastern money in to the us key stocks? Is this the monumental starting shot for the true  economic/commodity warfare between China and US?
Feels like China is now trying to bring down the us empire and I would love to read an updated macro/geopolitical outlook form you on this. This weeks actions feel monumental.

comment.body: Btw i saw a post showing this  👀  but i use alot statistics to trade in confluence, the problem in this kind of statistics is the range , april we had even days with 3% down and vix maybe 15% up , now we have -2% and vix +30% all these stuff are variables that makes those statistics a bit dangerous, but trading statistics is about follow the data always with risk management but anyways , ill prefer to be away of tech swings so far, i prefer to be day trade or maybe swing other sector for the moment 😂 i really prefer swing tech when spx is in positive gamma environment
